description: Analysis spec for food and beverage distributors - identify distribution businesses, online portals, and buying group affiliations

categories.label: Food Distributor
categories.description: Business primarily distributes food products (produce, meat, dairy, dry goods, etc.)

categories.label: Beverage Distributor
categories.description: Business primarily distributes beverage products (soft drinks, alcohol, water, juice, etc.)

categories.label: Food & Beverage Distributor
categories.description: Business distributes both food and beverage products

categories.label: Not a Distributor
categories.description: Business is not a distributor (e.g., manufacturer, retailer, restaurant, grocery store)

categories.label: Unrelated Business
categories.description: Completely unrelated to food or beverage distribution

business_name.description: Official name of the business or company

address.description: Full street address or business location

questions.question: Does this business mainly distribute food or beverage products?
Does this business have an online portal evidenced by something like a 'shop' or 'log in' button/link?
Does this business have any evidence of belonging to a buying group or association? If so, what are they? Provide as a comma-separated list, or leave blank if none found.
